title: pseuderanthemum tunicatum var. infundibuliforme
intro: Pseuderanthemum tunicatum var. infundibuliforme, also known as a variety of the Pseuderanthemum tunicatum plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the spread of infections. In herbal preparations, Pseuderanthemum tunicatum var. infundibuliforme is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to treat skin conditions or ingested to treat internal infections.
